title: How to Get to Mulanje, Malawi: Routes, Roads & Travel Tips
meta_title: How to Get to Mulanje Malawi: Routes & Travel Tips
meta_description: Wondering how to get to Mulanje Malawi? Our practical guide covers routes from Blantyre, Lilongwe & Thyolo — by bus, taxi or self-drive with insider tips.
author: The Thyolo House
excerpt: Getting to Mount Mulanje is easier than you think, but the route you choose makes all the difference. From Blantyre's minibuses to the scenic tea country road through Thyolo, here's everything you need to plan your journey.
content:
Blog post created at `src/content/blog/how-to-get-to-mulanje-malawi.json`.

**Summary:**
- ~2,000 words, SEO-optimized with "how to get to mulanje malawi" in the first paragraph and naturally throughout
- 7 H2 sections covering all outline points: Blantyre route, Lilongwe drive, Thyolo scenic route, transport options, self-drive tips, where to stop, and timing/packing
- **5 images** placed at natural break points (forest view, bougainvillea, garden walkway, outdoor dining, pool area)
- **4 natural Thyolo House mentions** — as a journey break, overnight base camp, lunch stop, and post-hike reward
- **3 internal links**: mulanje-day-trips-guide, mulanje-accommodation-where-to-stay, thyolo-tea-estate-tours-guide
- Links to /rooms/ and /restaurant/ pages
- WhatsApp CTA near the end in a blockquote
- Includes UNESCO World Heritage status (July 2025), Trek Mulanje airport transfers, MMCT/CLIMB project info
- Practical details: distances, costs ($11–17 taxi), fuel advice, GPS tips, minibus instructions
